pages.text: $(l)List of the 24 Solar Terms:$(br2)$(l)Spring:$() Beginning of Spring, Rain Water, Insects Awakening, Spring Equinox, Fresh Green, Grain Rain$(br)$(br)$(l)Summer:$() Beginning of Summer, Lesser Fullness, Grain in Ear, Summer Solstice, Lesser Heat, Greater Heat$(br)$(br)$(l)Autumn:$() Beginning of Autumn, End of Heat, White Dew, Autumnal

Equinox, Cold Dew, First Frost$(br)$(br)$(l)Winter:$() Beginning of Winter, Light Snow, Heavy Snow, Winter Solstice, Lesser Cold, Greater Cold$(br)$(br)$(l)List of Humidity Levels:$(br2)$()Arid, Dry, Average, Moist, Humid.
